title: 胧

[{"key":"0.036654254011731312","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/47336c55-f108-4fa9-8bb8-73fbe52d01b9.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/bc2c0173-10b3-4383-a1eb-bc7e842eab6a.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.08b8d0b984d118","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者胧，身份编码S01-043080，Re-A芯片状态稳定未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"晋经的属都帮派首领，如今的美梦俱乐部大总管，似平不论在那里，胧优秀的管理能力和分析能力都能让她获得席之地。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"毫无疑问，作为一个领导者，有着诸多优秀的品质心思细腻、计划周密、布局谨慎、行动果断。虽然大多数时候，她的应对突发事件的策略偏向于防御和保守，但她提出的那些滴水不漏的计划总能给美梦俱乐部带来稳定的收益。因此，就算胧刚刚来到美梦俱乐部不久，这位新晋的「大总管「也受到了大多数成员的认同和尊敬。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如果想要寻求合作者，胧无疑是可靠的选择。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2 79)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧施展绝技，以肉眼难以捕捉的高速剑术攻击敌方；对敌方单体造成"},{"text":"280%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"伤害，有"},{"text":"100%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"概率附加"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"回合【"},{"type":"button","id":"button-ece1d104fa3978","key":"RICH_TEXT_POPOVER","data":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"防御下降：防御下降60%。"}]}]},"children":[{"text":"防御下降"}]},{"text":"】。"}]}]},"moreInfo":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"2","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+15","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+25","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+40","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"/防御力"},{"text":"+5%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"260%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"color":"#ff0000","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"3","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：防御力"},{"text":"+70","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：附加【防御下降】概率提升至"},{"text":"85%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"4","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：暴击率"},{"text":"+4%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：伤害系数增加至"},{"text":"280%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级"},{"text":"5","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能提升：暴击率"},{"text":"+8%","color":"#ff0000"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能提升：附加【防御下降】概率提升至"},{"text":"100%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},"moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.e8d7896844901","type":"weapon-info","data":{"isShowIcon":false,"isShowLabel":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":false,"isShowTable":false,"isShowSkill":true,"title":"必杀/终结技","icon":"","label":"","name":"","desc":"","tableList":[{"key":"0.49157fa56beb","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能升级所需材料"}]}]},"colStyle":[{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"},{"align":"left"}],"head":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能4","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能5","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级3","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能6","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"4","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"潜能7","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"等级","bold":true},{"text":"5","color":"#272424","bold":true}]}]}],"body":[[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_105/h_102/50364/157597/2024/3/16/666032.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"36.63px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"35.59px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"(15)"}]}]},{"ty png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.901c446764fac8","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/389425.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【隐忍是最初的计谋。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「师父，我们为什么不直接向他们宣战？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"十几岁的胧站在门口，对面年迈的女人弯着腰，正为她整理着衣领，抚平每一条衣褶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还记得我跟你说过的吗，胧？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"师父的语气像往常一样，温和又坚定，像稳定燃烧着的烛光。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我们是小帮派，在蜃都，还有无数势力的力量凌驾于我们之上。如果想要自保，我们必须选择谨慎的策略，尽可能避免树敌，更要避免一切争斗。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"面对平静的师父，胧的疑惑并没能打消半分，于是她继续追问道：「我当然记得。但是，那群胆敢挑衅我们的帮派，根本算不上什么。就算是我们，消灭他们也不用费吹灰之力，为什么还要放任他们的无礼行为，甚至还要低声下气地去求别的大帮派来讲和？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那些人的狂妄，背后一定有其道理。或许是有大帮派撑腰，也或许是有什么我们所不知道的秘密武器。我们不能贸然动手，否则不仅是对自己同伴的不负责任，也会给敌人留下声讨我们的把柄。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"师父终于直起腰，拿起一个被锦缎包裹着的、沉甸甸的漆器礼盒，放在胧手中。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「好了，我们该出发了。拿好这份礼物吧，它对我们很重要。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【蛰伏是通向强大的路。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"雨后的小巷狭窄又泥泞，小巷的尽头，是灯红酒绿的闹市区，色彩斑斓的霓虹灯光，逐渐映上她和师父的衣角。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我还是不明白……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧低着头，目光盯着地面，数着每一块石砖。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「明明我们都侦查过，那群人背后，看不出一点其他势力插手的迹象。如果·……我是说如果，他们只是单纯的狂妄呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"师父摇摇头，否定了她的想法。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那也不行。如果真的向他们宣战，势必会引发争斗，让同胞受伤，折损我们的力量。一旦我们露出疲弱的事态。就会被那些虎视眈眈的势力盯上，引来更多不必要的冲突，这些冲突，会像雪球一样越滚越大，最终变成我们无法承受的雪崩。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那我们就只能过这种寄人篙下的日子了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧在巷口停下脚步，咬紧了嘴唇。师父已经走出的小巷，她在霓虹灯的光芒里转过身，摸了摸胧的头发。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「寄人篙下并不可耻，只有活到最后的人，才是真正的胜利者。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【蜕变是一切隐忍与蛰伏的报酬。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧沉默地跟在师父身后，两手空空，她们背对着闹市区的霓虹灯光，向着「家」走去。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"师父走在前面，不疾不徐，她并没有回头，只是温和地问道：「你还是不理解这一切，是吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧的脚步顿了一下，但又立刻跟上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是……但我会试着理解。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「有什么想不明白的地方吗？告诉我吧，我会试着为你解释。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我在想·……如果我们活着，就只是为了活着，那这一切，究竟有什么意义？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「意义就是，我们会韬光养晦，并且终有一日将会变强，让过去那些看不起我们的，全都刮目相看。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胧看着师父的背影，最终还是问道：「那变强之后呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「变强之后，再去改变世界上的不公，建立你自己的秩序。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"师父回以微笑，一如往常。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但在那之前，我们得先活下去。活着，才会有希望。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，2攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拥有独特的流血机制，未来可妻"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12攻势+8狂怒+6极影强袭"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伯爵"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/790941.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"K5nTuabwDZmmcMhw","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
